text:
/ci2 1 おお、援軍か！
それなら一気に攻め込むぞ！
行くぞ、イツキ！

/ci2 1 助太刀、感謝する。
互いに頑張ろうではないか！
よしイツキ、次だ！

/ci1 1 力及ばずか……
仕方ない、ここは退くとしよう！

/ci1 1 ぬぅ、油断した……
イツキ、あとは任せたぞ！

/ci1 1 だらしがないぞ、イツキ！
仕方ない、少し休んでい

/ci2 1 Oh, reinforcements! In that case, let's rush them!
Here we go, Itsuki!

/ci2 1 We're grateful for your aid. Let's all keep doing
our best! Time to go, Itsuki!

/ci1 1 Guess we weren't up to the task...
Can't be helped. This is where we retreat!
/ci1 1 Oof, got careless... Itsuki, the rest is up to you!

/ci1 1 You have no sense, Itsuki! Go ahead, rest for
awhile.
